mxCell.value: DFD Level 2 — Process 3: Lease & Tenant Onboarding

3.3
Create Lease
& Assign Unit
D2Properties, Units & Leases
D4Media & PDF Files
Level 2 = decomposition of a Level 1 process. Sub-process IDs use parent.child notation (e.g. 4.1). Balancing: flows in/out of parent match Level 1.
DFD Level 2 — Process 4: Rent Collection (M-PESA & Cash)
D4Media & PDF Files
D2Properties, Units & Leases
Level 2 = decomposition of a Level 1 process. Sub-process IDs use parent.child notation (e.g. 4.1). Balancing: flows in/out of parent match Level 1.
DFD Level 2 — Process 5: Governance (Reconciliation, Evidence, Integrity)

5.6
Log Activity
& Owner Alerts
D4Media & PDF Files
Level 2 = decomposition of a Level 1 process. Sub-process IDs use parent.child notation (e.g. 4.1). Balancing: flows in/out of parent match Level 1.
DFD Level 2 — Process 6: Room Transfer & Waitlist

6.5
Update Leases
& Unit Status
D2Properties, Units & Leases
Level 2 = decomposition of a Level 1 process. Sub-process IDs use parent.child notation (e.g. 4.1). Balancing: flows in/out of parent match Level 1.
